data.name: Blamed
data.detailed_description:
Game synopsis



David Fox's life is like an endless roller coaster - he works as a detective in the Delight City Police Department, enjoys authority among his police colleagues, leads a carefree lifestyle, and has a good time with girls. He is the best detective in the city and has managed to solve many seemingly hopeless cases during his career. But everything changes when a ruthless serial killer appears in the city, for whose crimes Fox will be blamed. Whether he can catch the killer and clear his reputation depends entirely on you.

What makes our game exciting?



* Each decision has its consequences.
* You build relationships with characters yourself.
* You can't save everyone.
* Not all characters will survive until the end of the story.
* Choose between the light or dark side of the hero.
* Hot girls await your attention.

Inside Demo



* Story setup.
* 30 minutes of gameplay.
* 500 Full HD renders.
* 11 animations.
* Branching storylines.
* A playlist that you'll put on repeat.

data.short_description: Blamed is an adult detective game in the visual novel genre. Walk the path of Detective David Fox and unravel a series of mysterious murders happening in the city. Make choices and influence the course of the investigation, conquer girls, and catch criminals.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 俄文, 日文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 印尼語, 韓文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 8 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
